missions.name: Asset-Backed Stockpile
missions.description: The Society wants bulk asteroid feedstock parked in inventory before the next hull-plate auction settles.

missions.name: Shielding Futures
missions.description: Vance is packaging magnetite-rich ore into radiation-shielded cargo pod futures. Deliver clean ore and keep the margin intact.

missions.name: Pressure Hull Reserve
missions.description: Society yards are paying premium rates for dense iron-nickel alloy suitable for storm-rated pressure hull ribs.
